meta.name: Lease vs Buy Comparator
meta.description: Industrial-grade decision support tool for comparing lease and buy options for capital equipment, incorporating total cost of ownership, utilization, and risk-adjusted cash flows.

inputs.label: Equipment Purchase Price
inputs.businessContext: Total upfront cost to acquire the asset if buying.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total upfront cost to acquire the asset if buying.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Satın alma durumunda varlığı edinmek için toplam peşin maliyet.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamte Anschaffungskosten für den Erwerb des Vermögenswerts beim Kauf.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût total initial pour acquérir l'actif en cas d'achat.
businessContext_i18n.es: Costo total inicial para adquirir el activo si se compra.

inputs.label: Lease Term
inputs.businessContext: Duration of the lease agreement in months.

businessContext_i18n.en: Duration of the lease agreement in months.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Durée du contrat de location en mois.
businessContext_i18n.es: Duración del contrato de arrendamiento en meses.

inputs.label: Monthly Lease Payment
inputs.businessContext: Fixed monthly payment under the lease contract.

businessContext_i18n.en: Fixed monthly payment under the lease contract.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kira sözleşmesi kapsamında sabit aylık ödeme.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Paiement mensuel fixe dans le cadre du contrat de location.
businessContext_i18n.es: Pago mensual fijo según el contrato de arrendamiento.

inputs.label: Residual Value at End of Lease
inputs.businessContext: Estimated market value of the equipment at lease end (if buying, this is salvage value).

label_i18n.en: Residual Value at End of Lease
label_i18n.fr: Valeur résiduelle en fin de location
label_i18n.es: Valor residual al final del arrendamiento

businessContext_i18n.en: Estimated market value of the equipment at lease end (if buying, this is salvage value).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kira sonunda ekipmanın tahmini piyasa değeri (satın alınıyorsa hurda değeri).
businessContext_i18n.de: Geschätzter Marktwert der Anlage am Leasingende (bei Kauf: Restwert).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Valeur marchande estimée de l'équipement en fin de location (si achat, il s'agit de la valeur de récupération).
businessContext_i18n.es: Valor de mercado estimado del equipo al final del arrendamiento (si se compra, este es el valor residual).

inputs.label: Annual Maintenance Cost (Buy)
inputs.businessContext: Expected yearly maintenance expense when owning the equipment.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected yearly maintenance expense when owning the equipment.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ekipmana sahip olunduğunda beklenen yıllık bakım gideri.
businessContext_i18n.de: Erwartete jährliche Wartungsausgaben bei Eigentum an der Anlage.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Dépense annuelle de maintenance prévue en cas de possession de l'équipement.
businessContext_i18n.es: Gasto de mantenimiento anual esperado al poseer el equipo.

inputs.label: Maintenance Included in Lease?
inputs.businessContext: Indicates whether the lease contract covers routine maintenance.

businessContext_i18n.en: Indicates whether the lease contract covers routine maintenance.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kira sözleşmesinin rutin bakımı kapsayıp kapsamadığını belirtir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gibt an, ob der Leasingvertrag die routinemäßige Wartung abdeckt.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Indique si le contrat de location couvre la maintenance de routine.
businessContext_i18n.es: Indica si el contrato de arrendamiento cubre el mantenimiento rutinario.

inputs.label: Discount Rate (WACC)
inputs.businessContext: Weighted average cost of capital used to discount future cash flows.

businessContext_i18n.en: Weighted average cost of capital used to discount future cash flows.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gelecekteki nakit akışlarını iskonto etmek için kullanılan ağırlıklı ortalama sermaye maliyeti.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gewichteter durchschnittlicher Kapitalkostensatz zur Diskontierung zukünftiger Cashflows.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût moyen pondéré du capital utilisé pour actualiser les flux de trésorerie futurs.
businessContext_i18n.es: Costo promedio ponderado del capital utilizado para descontar flujos de efectivo futuros.

inputs.label: Expected Utilization Rate
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of time the equipment is expected to be productive.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of time the equipment is expected to be productive.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ekipmanın üretken olması beklenen zaman yüzdesi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz der Zeit, in der die Anlage voraussichtlich produktiv ist.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de temps pendant lequel l'équipement est censé être productif.
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de tiempo que se espera que el equipo sea productivo.

rules.message: Lease term exceeds typical equipment life; consider buy option.
Low utilization may favor leasing to avoid idle asset cost.
High maintenance cost without lease coverage; evaluate total cost of ownership.

thresholds.message: Lease vs buy cost ratio is outside 0.8–1.2 band; perform sensitivity analysis.
Both options have negative NPV; reconsider investment decision.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
